name: Popover
goal: Provide a reusable anchored floating panel that opens from a trigger element and supports light-dismiss.
description: An anchored, non-modal overlay panel built on the native Popover API. Positions itself relative to a slotted trigger element using JS-computed placement across 8 standard anchor points. Supports light-dismiss via popover=auto, manual mode via popover=manual, an optional directional arrow, and programmatic show/hide/toggle methods. Emits ce-popover-open and ce-popover-close. Returns focus to the trigger on close.
limitations: Viewport overflow-flip (automatic placement flip when the panel would clip the viewport edge) is deferred to v2. CSS anchor-positioning (chrome-only as of 2026) is deferred to v2; JS positioning is used universally. The arrow position is centered on the trigger edge and does not account for panel overflow.

props.name: open
props.description: When true the panel is visible; setting to false closes it.

props.name: placement
props.description: Panel placement relative to the trigger. 8 values covering the four cardinal axes and three alignment variants (centered, start-aligned, end-aligned).

props.name: offset
props.description: Pixel gap between the trigger edge and the panel.

props.name: arrow
props.description: When true, renders a small directional arrow on the panel edge facing the trigger.

props.name: lightDismiss
props.description: When true (default), clicking outside or pressing Escape closes the panel via popover=auto. When false, uses popover=manual and the consumer must call hide() explicitly.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Opens the popover panel (equivalent to setting open=true).

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Closes the popover panel (equivalent to setting open=false).

slots.name: trigger
slots.description: The element that toggles the panel on click. Should be an interactive element (button, link). Receives aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, and aria-controls automatically.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition
cssVariables.description: Transition timing for open/close fade + scale animation.

cssVariables.name: --ce-popover-z
cssVariables.description: z-index override for the panel. Default 1000.

globalDependencies.purpose: Opens the panel in the browser top-layer.
Removes the panel from the browser top-layer.
Reads trigger and panel geometry for JS positioning.
Caches previously-focused element for focus-return on close.

sideEffects.description: Calls showPopover() / hidePopover() on the internal panel element.
sideEffects.reason: Required to enter/exit the browser top-layer for correct stacking without z-index battles.

sideEffects.description: Attaches window scroll and resize listeners while the panel is open.
sideEffects.reason: Keeps the panel aligned to the trigger when the page scrolls or the viewport resizes.

sideEffects.description: Captures and restores document.activeElement on open/close.
sideEffects.reason: WCAG 2.1 SC 2.4.3: focus must return to the trigger after the panel closes.

a11y.notes: The panel carries role=dialog and tabindex=-1. Focus moves to the panel on open and returns to the trigger on close. The slotted trigger receives aria-expanded (synced with open), aria-haspopup=true, and aria-controls pointing at the panel id. The trigger SHOULD be a native button or anchor so Enter/Space activation is provided by the browser. For non-button triggers, keyboard activation must be wired by the consumer.
